business_purpose: Reconcile provider refund exposure and isolate unresolved leakage candidates for the PLATINUM production-account close.

scope.eligible_refunded_order_definition: A distinct in-scope order with at least one effective settled logical refund.

money_policy.fx_basis: Use the daily fx_rates.usd_per_unit rate for each refund or reversal service_date and row currency.
money_policy.provider_exposure_definition: Effective settled USD less effective linked reversal USD.
money_policy.order_gross_comparison: Value the associated order gross in its order currency at the service_date of its in-scope settled refund.

provider_ranking.coverage: All providers represented by effective settled or effective linked reversal activity in scope.

candidate_if_any: The order's effective settled refund value after reversals is greater than its gross order value in USD.
The order has at least two unreversed effective settled logical refunds with the same normalized reason code.

exposure_status_policy.LOW: Leakage candidates are below 2% of eligible refunded orders and net provider exposure is below USD 25000.
exposure_status_policy.MODERATE: LOW does not apply, leakage candidates are below 6% of eligible refunded orders, and net provider exposure is below USD 60000.
